title: Add expression support for x14:cfRule
author: bno1
body:
<!-- Thanks for submitting a pull request! Please provide enough information so that others can review your pull request. The two fields below are mandatory. -->

## Summary

Adds expression support for `x14:cfRule` nodes. The formula is handled similarly to `cfRule` nodes because the conditional formattings rules are merged together.

Closes #1751 

<!-- Explain the **motivation** for making this change. What existing problem does the pull request solve? -->

## Test plan

<!-- Demonstrate the code is solid. Example: The exact commands you ran and their output, screenshots / videos if the pull request changes UI. -->

I tested the spreadsheet I was having problems with in #1751 and everything works fine now.

comments.author: bno1
comments.body: @Siemienik Added a unit test for the new rule type

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
Thank you 😄 
Could I ask you to upload an example file that uses these structures, please?

comments.author: bno1
comments.body:
@Siemienik I added an example file, but writing the test I discovered a few bugs: in the written file, the `x14:cfRule` nodes were missing the `x14:dxf` child that describes the formatting changes. In other words, the formatting rules were no-ops.

To fix this, I made a copy of the `dxf-xformat.js` as `dxf-ext-xformat.js` with the only difference being the tag name: `x14:dxf`. This is now used in `cf-rule-ext-xform.js` for storing the dxf.

comments.author: bno1
comments.body: Sorry for all the force-pushes, it's pretty late here but I wanted to finish this.

comments.author: ryegye24
comments.body: Hey I just came across this PR after some googling when I ran into the same problem. I work for [AmberEngine](https://github.com/AmberEngine) and wanted to chime in for visibility and to say that this fix would be a big help for us. Thanks!

comments.author: HaaLeo
comments.body: @Siemienik any chance to get this one in soon? I run in the same problem as described in #1751.

Siemienik
